WITH segment_consumption AS (
  SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
    COUNT(DISTINCT y.CustomerID) AS num_customers
  FROM 
    yearmonth y
  JOIN 
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE 
    y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
  GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
),
annual_average AS (
  SELECT 
    Segment,
    total_consumption / num_customers AS annual_avg_consumption
  FROM 
    segment_consumption
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_average WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
  (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_average WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM_diff,
  (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_average WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
  (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_average WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM_diff,
